summary: HR Admin Module Frontend Testing - Iteration 99. All 7 tabs verified successfully: Dashboard (5 metric cards + Monthly Salary Budget + Department Strength), Employees (directory with Add/View/Edit/Terminate), Roles & Credentials (30 users with Create User/Edit Role/Reset Password/Delete), Attendance (monthly calendar with clickable cells), Leave (filter buttons Pending/Approved/Rejected/All), Payroll (month/year selector + Calculate Salary), Settings (Company Info + Department Timings + Annual Leave Limits). All OLD features (Employee CRUD, Roles & Credentials) preserved alongside NEW features (Dashboard, Attendance, Leave, Payroll, Settings).

issues: Employee Vinoth shows ₹0 Net Salary - salary structure needs to be configured (noted in iteration_98)
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby warning in console (accessibility improvement)

test_credentials.Super Admin: Demo Access > Login as Demo User (admin@constructionos.com)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (1 staff member Vinoth, 30 users)
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Admin module fully functional with all 7 tabs working. Frontend verification complete.

dashboard_tab.evidence: 5 metric cards (Active Employees: 1, Total Users: 30, Present Today: 1, Late Today: 0, Pending Leaves: 0), Monthly Salary Budget (₹0), Departments (0), Department Strength section (Unassigned: 1)

employees_tab.evidence: Employee Directory title, Add Employee button, Search input, Department filter, Employee table with Vinoth (EMP0001), View/Edit/Terminate action buttons

add_employee_dialog.evidence: Multi-section form with 5 collapsible sections: Personal Information (Full Name, Email, Phone, DOB, Gender, Blood Group, Marital Status, Father's Name, Mother's Name), Employment Details, ID & Documents, Address & Emergency Contact, Salary & Bank Details. Notes field and Add Employee button

view_employee_dialog.evidence: Employee Profile dialog showing Vinoth with Employee Code EMP0001, active status, ID & Documents section, Address & Emergency section, Salary Details (Basic, HRA, DA, TA, Other Allow., Gross, PF, ESI, Prof. Tax, TDS, Other Ded., Net Salary), Bank Details (Payment Method), Close and Edit buttons

roles_credentials_tab.evidence: User Roles & Credentials title, Create User button, Search input, Role filter, 30 user rows, Table columns (USER, EMAIL, ROLE, LINKED EMPLOYEE, STATUS, ACTIONS), Edit Role/Reset Password/Delete action buttons

create_user_dialog.evidence: Create User Account dialog with Link to Employee dropdown, Name field, Username (Email) field, Role dropdown, Password field with visibility toggle, Confirm Password field, Cancel and Create User buttons

attendance_tab.evidence: March 2026 display, Month navigation arrows, Calendar/Late Report toggle, Status legend (P=Present, PL=Paid Leave, SL=Sick Leave, CL=Casual Leave, W=WFH, H=Half Day, A=Absent), Calendar grid with days 1-31, Employee Vinoth row with clickable cells, Summary columns (P, A, L)

leave_tab.evidence: Filter buttons (Pending/Approved/Rejected/All), Table headers (Employee, Type, Dates, Days, Reason, Status, Actions), 'No leave requests found' message

payroll_tab.evidence: Month selector (March), Year selector (2026), Calculate Salary button, Summary cards (Total Gross ₹0, Total Deductions ₹0, Total Net Pay ₹0), Payroll table with columns (Employee, Working, Present, LOP, Late, Gross, Deductions, Net Pay, Payslip), Vinoth row showing Working:26, Present:1, LOP:25

settings_tab.evidence: Company Information (Company Name: Urbanspace Builders, Company Address), Department Timings (6 departments: default, Engineering, Accounts, HR, Admin, Sales with Start/End/Grace configurable), Annual Leave Limits (PL:12 with Carry Forward, SL:12, CL:6, WFH:24), Save Settings button
